metadata.title: Ruban Rouge — Artisan Bakery in Meknès since 1940
metadata.description: Discover Ruban Rouge, the premier artisan bakery in Meknès since 1940. Specialists in bakery, viennoiseries, fine pastries, chocolates and ice cream.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: A family tradition of excellence
story.description: Since 1940, Ruban Rouge has embodied the art of French pastry in the heart of Meknès. Three generations of master artisans have perpetuated our unique know-how, combining traditional techniques and modern creativity.

histoire_page.title: Our Story
histoire_page.subtitle: 85 years of passion and excellence
histoire_page.intro: Since 1940, Ruban Rouge has been more than just a pastry shop. It's a Meknès institution, a symbol of quality and artisanal craftsmanship passed down through generations.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We select the finest ingredients and use proven techniques to create exceptional pastries.

tradition.title: Tradition
tradition.description: Our authentic recipes are the result of 85 years of experience and continuous refinement.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: While respecting our traditions, we integrate new creations to surprise and delight our customers.

famille.title: Family
famille.description: Every customer is welcomed as a member of the Ruban Rouge family, with warmth and care.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: Foundation of Ruban Rouge by our grandfather, a master pastry chef trained in France. Opening of the first shop in the heart of Meknès.

timeline.title: Expansion
timeline.description: Introduction of new chocolate specialties and opening of the production workshop. Ruban Rouge becomes a reference in Meknès.

timeline.title: Second Generation
timeline.description: Transmission of know-how to the second generation. Modernization of equipment while preserving artisanal methods.

timeline.title: Diversification
timeline.description: Launch of our artisanal ice cream range and expansion of our traditional Moroccan pastry offerings.

timeline.title: Third Generation
timeline.description: The new generation brings a breath of modern creativity while honoring the family heritage.

timeline.title: Today
timeline.description: Ruban Rouge continues to innovate and delight the palates of Meknès residents and visitors, with 85 years of artisanal excellence.

creations_page.title: Our Creations
creations_page.subtitle: Discover our artisanal craftsmanship
creations_page.intro: Each creation is the result of know-how passed down through generations, combining tradition and innovation to offer you exceptional pastries.
creations_page.no_products: No products in this category at the moment.

visit.title: Visit Us
visit.address: 198 Bd des F.A.R., Résidence Al Hamd, Meknès

footer.about_description: Passion, imagination and tradition — quality craftsmanship since 1940.
footer.address: 198 Bd des F.A.R., Résidence Al Hamd

orders.title: Custom Orders
orders.subtitle: Let's create your dream cake together
orders.description: Whether for a wedding, birthday, or any other special event, our master pastry chefs create custom cakes that elevate your celebrations.

testimonials_data.name: Fatima El Amrani
testimonials_data.text: The best pastries in Meknès! The mille-feuille is divine and the butter croissants are perfect. Exceptional craftsmanship passed down through generations.

testimonials_data.name: Ahmed Bennani
testimonials_data.text: I ordered a birthday cake for my 50th. It was a work of art as much as a delight. Everyone was impressed. Thank you Ruban Rouge!

testimonials_data.name: Sophie Martin
testimonials_data.text: An essential address in Meknès. The quality is always there, whether for morning viennoiseries or cakes for special occasions.

testimonials_data.name: Rachid Tazi
testimonials_data.text: Since my childhood, Ruban Rouge has been part of my best memories. The recipes haven't changed and that's wonderful! A true treasure of our city.
